creator: jarrod@netleader.com.au
text:
The net-mgmt/nagios port is about to undergo a bump up to 3.0.3 and  
will be followed by a retirement of net-mgmt/nagios-devel.  The  
development port hasn't had the event broker enabled so, at least  
initially, I would like to have the event broker enabled by an option  
and disabled by default.  Is this going to cause net-mgmt/ndoutils any  
grief?

Jarrod.
